title: PARENT-ACTIVITY (15s) — Papa teaches Sara and Eva to flip ONE patty each
prompt: Wide cinematic medium shot of @backyard-grill-area, sunny golden-hour light, faint heat-shimmer above the grates. @Papa already in the CENTER at the grill wearing @papas-apron, holding a long metal spatula in one hand, big proud teaching grin. @Sara already standing on the LEFT next to Papa, on a small upturned wooden block to reach grill height, both hands gripping a kid-sized spatula. @Eva already standing on the RIGHT at the other side of Papa on her own block, holding her own kid-sized spatula. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Papa (cheerful coach voice): "Okay champs — gentle slide UNDER, then a confident FLIP — like THIS!" He demonstrates with his spatula, flipping a juicy patty cleanly with a satisfying *sizzle*. Sara (eyes saucers): "OOH!" Eva (gasping, hand to mouth): "Pro chef Papa!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Sara goes first — slowly slides her spatula under a patty, scrunches her face in concentration, FLIPS — the patty lands cleanly with a sizzle. Sara (fists pumping in the air for one second): "YESSS! Bun Squad CAN COOK!" Papa beams down at her, totally proud, gives her a giant thumbs-up. (BEAT 3 — 10-15s) Eva tries next — slides her spatula under, flips with WAY too much enthusiasm, the patty rotates almost end-over-end and lands askew with a loud *SPLAT* of grease. Eva freezes one second wide-eyed, then breaks into a triumphant grin. Eva (arms up, triumphant): "BURGER GYMNASTICS! TEN POINTS!" Papa laughs and ruffles her hair. Papa (grinning): "My grill team, ladies and gentlemen!"
